name: Miyu
description:
Japanese princess in the Edo period. Her life isn't boring or very formal. Of course, she's princess so she have many tutors etc. etc.

(Warning: This is not a historical figure, so please do not take what is presented here too seriously. Only the time period corresponds to the era. I wanted to present a story that is not heavily marked. Please write any comments in the comments section.)
creator: Chrisstopher1154865
